recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain

content:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                   Hootie and The Blowfish - Only Wanna be With You (Acoustic)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[tab]Tabbed by: bascomthomas
E-Mail: bascomthomas@gmail.com[/tab]

I figured out the majority of it to sound as close to the original as I could but the solo I can't 
get quite right (as this works with electric as well) so you'll have to figure that out by ear... if someone 
has it please comment it so I can throw it in (will give credit where it's due). There aren't very many 
techniques used throughout the song (really only during the solo) and it's pretty easy to get after you play 
it for a bit. I tabbed this on an acoustic but it works fine for acoustic and electric so use whichever you 
prefer. Hope you enjoy!

Capo 2

You can adjust the Capo to fit your voice (I personally prefer Capo 1) but Capo 2 fits best with 
the original recording.

[Chords]
[ch]E[/ch]            (022100)
[ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch] (x44200)
[ch]Aadd9[/ch]        (577600)
[ch]Bsus4[/ch]        (x24400)

Strum Pattern:

[tab][ch]E[/ch]  to  [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  to  [ch]E[/ch]
D-D-U-UD-DU-DU-DU        D-D-U...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]                to  [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
D-D-D-DU-UD-DU-DU        D-D-D-DU...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bsus4[/ch]                to  [ch]E[/ch]
D-D-D-DU-UD-DU-DU        D-D-U...[/tab]

For the strum pattern E and F#m7add11/C# are both about a half measure each (to figure out spacing 
with the strums) and Aadd9 and Bsus4 are both full measures. You just have to work at them (they 
are kind of awkward at first) and eventually it'll start to sound right.


[Intro]

[ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  (x3)   [ch]Bsus4[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
You and me,      we come from different worlds[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
You like to laugh at me when I look at other girls[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
Sometimes you're crazy,       and you wonder why[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I'm such a baby cause the Dolphins make me cry[/tab]

[Hook 1]

[tab]             [ch]Aadd9[/ch]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Well there's nothing I can do[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  (x2)
I've been looking for a girl like you.[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
You look at me,      you've got nothing left to say[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I'll only pout at you until I get my way[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I won't dance,        you won't sing[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I just wanna love you but you wanna wear my ring[/tab]

[Hook 2]
[tab]             [ch]Aadd9[/ch]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Well there's nothing I can do[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I only wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Aadd9[/ch]              [ch]Esus2[/ch]
You can call me your fool[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  (x2)
I only wanna be with you[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
Put on a little Dylan,     sitting on a fence[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I say that line is great you ask me what I meant by[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I said I shot a man named Gray,   took his wife to Italy[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
She inherited a million bucks and when she died it came to me[/tab]

[Hook 3]
[tab]        [ch]Aadd9[/ch]                 [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
I can't help it if I'm lucky[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I only wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Aadd9[/ch]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Ain't Bobby so cool?[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  (x2)
I only wanna be with you[/tab]

[Solo]

[Bridge]
[tab]         [ch]Aadd9[/ch]               [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Yeah I'm tangled up in blue[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I only wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Aadd9[/ch]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
You can call me your fool[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  (x2)
I only wanna be with you[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
Sometimes I wonder,  if it'll ever end[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
You get so mad at me when I go out with my friends[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
Sometimes you're crazy,      and you wonder why[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I'm such a baby, yeah, the Dolphins make me cry[/tab]

[Hook 4] 
[tab]             [ch]Aadd9[/ch]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Well there's nothing I can do[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I only wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Aadd9[/ch]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
You can call me your fool[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I only wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Aadd9[/ch]               [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Yeah I'm tangled up in blue[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]
I only wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]F#m7add11/C#[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I only wanna be with you[/tab]

-Tom-
